'''Gavele Lemora''' was the [[Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|head]] of the [[Ministry of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Ministry of Intelligence]] for the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. She was a middle aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman with a round face. Along with [[Five World Prime Minister|Prime Minister]] [[Dur Gejjen]] and [[Minister of Defense (Five Worlds)|Minister of Defense]] [[Rorf Willems]], she was one of the three most important people on the [[High Cabinet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''
